allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const data=fs.readFileSync\('src/store/wordDatabase.ts','utf8'\); const m=data.match\(/const T1[\\s\\S]*?\\];/\); if\(m\){const lines=m[0].split\('\\n'\).filter\(l=>l.includes\("'"\)\); console.log\('T1 words:', lines.length\);}")
Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); console.log\(typeof cedict\); console.log\(Object.keys\(cedict\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const wl = require\('word-list'\); console.log\(typeof wl\); console.log\(wl.length || 'no length'\); console.log\(wl.slice\(0,5\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); console.log\(cedict['hello']\); console.log\(cedict['world']\); console.log\(cedict['about']\);")
Bash(node -e "const wl = require\('word-list'\); const arr = wl.default || wl; console.log\(typeof arr\); console.log\(arr.length\); console.log\(arr.slice\(0,10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); const keys = Object.keys\(cedict\); console.log\('keys:', keys.length\); console.log\(cedict[keys[0]]\); console.log\(cedict[keys[1]]\); console.log\(cedict[keys[2]]\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const wl = require\('word-list'\); const path = wl.default; console.log\('path:', path\); const content = fs.readFileSync\(path, 'utf-8'\); const words = content.split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\); console.log\('total words:', words.length\); console.log\(words.slice\(0,20\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); const vals = Object.values\(cedict\); const sample = vals.find\(v => v.traditional === '世界'\); console.log\(sample || 'not found'\); const sample2 = vals.find\(v => v.traditional && v.traditional.includes\('学'\)\); console.log\(sample2\);")
Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); const vals = Object.values\(cedict\); for \(let i = 0; i < 20; i++\) { console.log\(vals[i]\); }")
Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); const vals = Object.values\(cedict\); const e = vals.find\(v => v.traditional === '学'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(e, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); const vals = Object.values\(cedict\); const found = vals.filter\(v => v.traditional.includes\('爱'\)\).slice\(0,3\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(found, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const cedict = require\('cedict'\); const vals = Object.values\(cedict\); for \(let i = 100; i < 110; i++\) { const e = vals[i]; console.log\(e.traditional, JSON.stringify\(e.definitions[0]?.translations\)\); }")
Bash(node -e "const aiciba = require\('aiciba'\); console.log\(typeof aiciba\); console.log\(Object.keys\(aiciba\)\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import aiciba from 'aiciba'; console.log\(typeof aiciba\); console.log\(Object.keys\(aiciba\)\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { translate } from '@vitalets/google-translate-api'; const r = await translate\('hello world', { from: 'en', to: 'zh-CN' }\); console.log\(r.text\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('src/store/wordDatabase.ts','utf-8'\); const m = src.match\(/const T1[\\s\\S]*?^\\];/m\); const lines = m[0].split\('\\n'\); let translated = 0; let total = 0; for \(const line of lines\) { const matches = [...line.matchAll\(/\\['\([^']+\)'\\s*,\\s*'\([^']*\)'\\s*,\\s*'\([^']+\)'\\]/g\)]; for \(const match of matches\) { total++; if \(match[2] !== match[1]\) translated++; } } console.log\('T1 total:', total, 'translated:', translated\);")
